name: bilibili-followers
author: AWTRIX Mock
description: Display Bilibili follower count for a given UID

inputs.label: Bilibili UID
inputs.description: Open your Bilibili profile page; the number after /space/ in the URL is your UID, e.g. https://space.bilibili.com/19445169.
inputs.description-cn: 打开 Bilibili 个人主页，URL 中 /space/ 后面的数字就是 UID，例如 https://space.bilibili.com/19445169。
